subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of Bahá! I find no title more noble than this wherewith to address thee, for today it is the greatest bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه البهاء عنوانی اشرف از این نیابم تا ترا بان خطاب نمایم الیوم اعظم موهبت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @high station of the true believer, @consolation and comfort
